# CVE Core Harness

The control plane for deterministic, agentic technical vetting.

## Context

This repository provides global governance, safety guardrails, and commercial evaluation logic for a suite of recruiting agents. It is designed to be injected into domain-specific agents (for example, RF and RISC-V) so grading and outreach stay consistent and ethical.

## Key structures

- **`/logic`** — Master evaluation heuristics (commercial and technical).
- **`/config`** — System-wide behavior and agent constitutions.
- **`/UI`** — Unified CSS and HTML for tactical dashboards.

## Principles

- **Deterministic grading** — Every output must include a Technical Thesis.
- **HITL** — Human-in-the-loop is mandatory for all outreach.
- **Modular injection** — Specialist agents pull from this core for shared rules.
